mapper.insert: insert into audit_record (content_id, auditor_id, audit_result, audit_reason, create_time) values (#{contentId}, #{auditorId}, #{auditResult}, #{auditReason}, now())
mapper.select: select id, content_id, auditor_id, audit_result, audit_reason, create_time from audit_record where content_id = #{contentId} order by create_time desc
